title: RSA Encryption, Signatures, and Safe Migration · Runtime Contract: Crypto Go Rsa Oaep
summary: A service encrypts large payloads directly with textbook RSA, verifies PKCS#1 v1.5 signatures by default, and accepts any PEM key without purpose or size validation. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the rsa oaep increment in RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Use RSA-OAEP only for bounded key material with matching hash and label context and uniform decryption failure.
Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Rsa Oaep · Theory Crypto Go Rsa Oaep
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 5554 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate RSA on trusted keys, OAEP or PSS purpose, payload limits, and uniform failure; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then remove one transfer gate and state exactly which production claim is no longer supported. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Rsa Oaep contract for the supplied data.
